title: 71. Design Add and Search Words Data Structure

examples.explanation: After adding 'bad', 'dad', and 'mad', searching 'pad' returns false, 'bad' returns true, '.ad' matches 'bad'/'dad'/'mad', 'b..' matches 'bad'.
After adding 'a', searching '.' matches 'a', searching 'a' matches 'a', searching 'aa' returns false.

hints: Use a Trie (prefix tree) as the underlying data structure for efficient prefix matching.
For the search method with '.', use DFS/backtracking to try all 26 possible child nodes when a dot is encountered.
